raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$2000.00} by a merchant claiming to offer a spiritual cleanse involving XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX None of these services were ever performed. I canceled further services on XX/XX/XXXX and have screenshots of this request. 

I disputed the charge with Citi, and a temporary credit was issued while they investigated. However, Citi denied the dispute based solely on the merchants refusal to refund. I was never given a chance to respond to the merchants evidence or to submit mine. 

Citi claims I missed a XX/XX/XXXX deadline for additional documents. I received no email or phone alertonly a letter buried in the app, which did not notify me. I rely on email due to a recent move and work long hours in a correctional facility without phone access. I called Citi on XX/XX/XXXX and was told the chargeback was still pending. No deadline was mentioned during that phone call. 

I have repeatedly asked Citi to show me the merchants submitted evidence and allow me to respond, but they have not provided this. The process was not fair, transparent, or compliant with Regulation Z. I am asking the CFPB to help ensure a proper reinvestigation.
